candidates.why: Exact balance sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT definition.
Balancing/check line, not the reported total current assets line.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet cash and cash equivalents line; directly matches CHE.
Cash flow ending cash can reconcile to cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.
Cash flow beginning balance is not the balance sheet cash account for the period-end target.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as required.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; directly matches LCT.
A component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing/check line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clean current interest-bearing debt total and excludes leases by wording; best match for short-term debt.

candidates.row_label: Current portion of long-term interest-bearing debts excluding leases
candidates.why: Current maturities of long-term debt excluding leases; needed in addition if short-term interest-bearing debt does not already include them.
Also represents current maturities excluding leases, but appears as a maturity schedule duplicate of the cleaner current-portion line.

candidates.row_label: Current portion of long-term interest-bearing debts
candidates.why: Current maturities line but includes leases; less preferred than excluding-leases version.
Interest payable is not debt principal, so not appropriate for STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current portion of long-term interest-bearing debts excluding leases

variables.notes: Chose two non-lease current debt components: short-term interest-bearing debt plus current portion of long-term interest-bearing debt excluding leases. Avoided lease rows and avoided the duplicate maturity-schedule label 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to reduce double counting.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable line on the balance sheet; directly matches TXP.
Exact total/net PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Right of use tangible assets - Net
candidates.why: ROU assets are a separate tangible asset category and not the total PPE line; less preferred.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/check line, not the reported PPE total.

variables.notes: Used the reported total net PPE line.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches AT.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Exact operating cash flow subtotal on the cash flow statement; directly matches OANCF.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.
